title: Public transport problem
subtitle: Ask when transport changes.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: The next bus leaves in fifteen minutes.
下一班公交十五分钟后出发。
This train does not stop here today.
这列火车今天不停这里。
When does the next bus leave?
下一班公交什么时候出发？

items.en: The next bus leaves in fifteen minutes.
items.zh: 下一班公交十五分钟后出发。

items.en: This train does not stop here today.
items.zh: 这列火车今天不停这里。

items.en: When does the next bus leave?
items.zh: 下一班公交什么时候出发？

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: When does the next bus leave?
lines.zh: 下一班公交什么时候出发？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: This train does not stop here today.
lines.zh: 这列火车今天不停这里。

items.en: The next bus leaves in fifteen minutes.
items.zh: 下一班公交十五分钟后出发。

items.en: This train does not stop here today.
items.zh: 这列火车今天不停这里。

items.en: Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
